meta.title: Categories Metabox Enhanced — Single-term UI Demo
meta.author: 1fixdotio
meta.description: Pre-configured WordPress with the Categories metabox switched to radio buttons. Open the seeded post or create a new one to see the single-term UI in both the Block Editor sidebar and Classic Editor metabox.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $matches = glob('/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/categories-metabox-enhanced*', GLOB_ONLYDIR); $plugin_dir = $matches ? $matches[0] : ''; if ($plugin_dir && file_exists($plugin_dir . '/blueprint/seed/seed-data.php')) { wp_mkdir_p('/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins'); copy($plugin_dir . '/blueprint/seed/mu-demo-notice.php', '/wordpress/wp-content/mu-plugins/cme-demo-notice.php'); require $plugin_dir . '/blueprint/seed/seed-data.php'; } else { error_log('CME demo seed: plugin directory not found, skipping seed'); }
